baslik: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
ozet: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

baslik: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
ozet: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

baslik: UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
ozet: Israel rejects the new report by the three-member expert panel, calling it a "libellous sham".

baslik: Zambia ex-president's family wins latest legal battle over what should happen to his body
ozet: Edgar Lungu's family and the Zambian government remain in dispute 12 months after he died.

baslik: Trump anticipates better relationship with Colombia under new leader
ozet: Abelardo de la Espriella, who preliminary results suggest is Colombia's next president, had Trump's endorsement.
